data.body: 4af8 (differ-DI routing) IMPLEMENTED. Subagent injected the vendor MAPPER entrypoint into outbound_differ/inbound_differ/apply_inbound via Backend port (run_differs is injection point; default-None resolves via neutral select_backend seam). Link constant relocated to adapters/jira/jira_fields.py. Fixed subagent's collection-break (module-level dotted-key outbound_fields load in test_reconcile_roundtrip poisoned rebar_reconciler name -> made lazy+flat-key; whole-tree collection 7178->7183 clean). Validated: full suite 1381 pass, no test weakening (0 asserts removed), teeth confirmed (injection bites), lint+typecheck+module-size green. SCOPE: mapper entrypoint routed through port (principal ADR win); non-mapping helpers (_diff_fields/_extract_jira_field/_assignee_matches + reconcile_check lazy load) remain, documented in neutrality gate. Committed 6297f179a, amended env-docs, pushed Gerrit change 914. Next: gate->merge->narrow AC->close 4af8->close epic bbf1.
